name: AnalysisModel
summary: The AnalysisModel class contains information related to analysis models.

constructors.name: AnalysisModel
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the AnalysisModel class.

methods.name: Delete
methods.summary: Deletes an analysis model. The AnalysisModelName has to be set.

methods.name: Insert
methods.summary: Inserts a new analysis model into the Tekla Structures model. The AnalysisModelName has to be set.

methods.name: Modify
methods.summary: Modifies an analysis model. The AnalysisModelName has to be set.

methods.name: Select()
methods.summary: Selects an analysis model. Updates the model. The AnalysisModelName or ID has to be set.

methods.name: Select(Boolean)
methods.summary: Selects an analysis model. The AnalysisModelName or ID has to be set.

params.name: update
params.doc: Indicates whether analysis model is updated.

properties.name: AnalysisConnectivityRules
properties.summary: Gets or sets the analysis model connectivity rules.

properties.name: AnalysisEngine
properties.summary: Gets or sets the analysis engine of the analysis model.

properties.name: AnalysisLoadCombinations
properties.summary: Gets the analysis load combinations of the analysis model.

properties.name: AnalysisLoadGroups
properties.summary: Gets the analysis load groups of the analysis model.

properties.name: AnalysisMethod
properties.summary: Gets or sets the analysis method of the analysis model.

properties.name: AnalysisModelDesignProperties
properties.summary: Gets or sets the analysis model design properties.

properties.name: AnalysisModelJobProperties
properties.summary: Gets or sets the analysis model job properties.

properties.name: AnalysisModelModalAnalysisProperties
properties.summary: Gets or sets the analysis model modal analysis properties.

properties.name: AnalysisModelName
properties.summary: Gets or sets the analysis model name.

properties.name: AnalysisModelOutputProperties
properties.summary: Gets or sets the analysis model output properties.

properties.name: AnalysisModelSeismicProperties
properties.summary: Gets or sets the analysis model seismic properties.

properties.name: AnalysisModelSpectrumProperties
properties.summary: Gets or sets the analysis model spectrum properties

properties.name: AnalysisNodeLinks
properties.summary: Gets the analysis node links of the analysis model.

properties.name: AnalysisNodes
properties.summary: Gets the analysis nodes of the analysis model.

properties.name: AnalysisObjectType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the analysis object.

properties.name: AnalysisParts
properties.summary: Gets the analysis parts of the analysis model.

properties.name: AnalysisRigidDiaphragms
properties.summary: Gets the analysis rigid diaphragms of the analysis model.

properties.name: AutodetectSecondaries
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether bracing members are detected automatically.

properties.name: BracingFilterName
properties.summary: Gets or sets the bracing filter name.

properties.name: ConstructionMethod
properties.summary: Gets or sets the construction method of the analysis model.

properties.name: FatherObject2ID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the father part.

properties.name: FatherObject2Type
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the father object.

properties.name: FatherObjectID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the father part.

properties.name: FatherObjectType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the father object.

properties.name: FilterName
properties.summary: Gets or sets the filter name of the analysis model.

properties.name: ID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the analysis object.

properties.name: IncludeImperfections
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether imperfections are to be included.

properties.name: MemberAxislocation
properties.summary: Gets or sets the axis location of the members.

properties.name: MemberEndReleaseMethodByJoint
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the end releases are set by joint properties.

properties.name: ModelUpdateModificationIdentifier
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the model update modification.

properties.name: NodePositionTolerance
properties.summary: Gets or sets the node position tolerance of the analysis model.

properties.name: NumberOfIterations
properties.summary: Gets or sets the number of iterations of the analysis model.

properties.name: PhysicalFreezed
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the physical objects are frozen.

properties.name: PhysicalFrozen
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the physical objects are frozen.

properties.name: RelativeAccuracy
properties.summary: Gets or sets the relative accuracy of the analysis model.

properties.name: ResultsFreezed
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the results are frozen.

properties.name: ResultsFrozen
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the results are frozen.

properties.name: ResultsModificationIdentifier
properties.summary: Gets or sets the results modification identifier.

properties.name: ResultsTime
properties.summary: Gets or sets the results time.

properties.name: SecondaryFilterName
properties.summary: Gets or sets the bracing filter name.

properties.name: SecondaryKeepAxis
properties.summary: Gets or sets the secondary keep axis settings. Not used, bracing/secondary members always have KEEP_AXIS_NO initially.

properties.name: SecondaryMemberFilterName
properties.summary: Gets or sets the secondary member filter name.

properties.name: SnapDistance
properties.summary: Gets or sets the snap distance of the analysis model.

properties.name: UseModelMerge
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether model merge is used.

properties.name: UseTrueCurvedMembers
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether members are true curved.

properties.name: UseTwinProfiles
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether twin profiles are used.
